Title: hyatt-place-new-york-city-times-square
Content: Hyatt Place New York City/Times Square features air-conditioned rooms with satellite flat-screen TV in the Hell's Kitchen district of New York City. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a 24-hour front desk and a shared lounge, along with free WiFi throughout the property. The hotel has newspapers and an ATM machine that guests can use.
Map Address: Nefertiti, Maabad Luxor Street, Luxor City, Luxor, 85951, Egypt
